MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul Lannus of LANKFORD CRAWFORD MORENO & OSTERTAG LLP (925-300-3520), appearing for defendant / moving party Ford Motor Company
Andrew J. McEnaney of HISSEY * KIENTZ (512-320-9100), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Albert Lawrence Levene

RULING:
DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ford Motor Co.'s motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 1, 2 and 3 (plaintiffs' causes of action for false representation and intentional tort/intentional failure to warn and claim for punitive damages) and taken off calendar as to issue 4 (Michigan law for punitive damages). Defendant sustained its initial burden and plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether defendant is liable for false representation, intentional tort/intentional failure to warn or punitive damages. Adjudication of issue 4 is off calendar as moot given the court's ruling on issue 3. Defendant's objections to plaintiffs submitting defendant's interrogatory responses are overruled. Order revised and signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Motion To Compel Bruce Tassi'S Deposition And To Hold Him In Contempt For Failure To Appear
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Hong T. He of CARROLL, BURDICK & McDONOUGH LLP (415-989-5900), appearing for defendants / moving parties Volkswagen Group of America, Inc. and Volvo Cars of North America, LLC

RULING:
DEFENDANTS VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC. & VOLVO CARS OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL BRUCE TASSI'S DEPOSITION AND TO HOLD HIM IN CONTEMPT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR

No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants Volkswagen Group of America, Inc. and Volvo Cars of North America, LLC's motion to compel Bruce Tassi's deposition and to hold him in contempt for failure to appear is granted. No opposition filed. Mr. Tassi is compelled to comply with the deposition subpoena served on him on May 1, 2012 on the following terms and conditions: (1) He shall appear for his deposition on August 13, 2012, at 10:00am; (2) The place of the deposition shall be Carroll, Burdick & McDonough LLP, 44 Montgomery Street, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94104; (3) The deposition will occur pursuant to defendants' deposition subpoena; and (4) He shall produce all documents and things in his possession, custody or control that are responsive to the requests for documents contained in the subpoena. Mr. Tassi is held in contempt of court pursuant to C.C.P. sections 1209(a)(10), 2023.010(d) and 2023.030(e). Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
